headline: All Hail King Jesus: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: All Hail King Jesus carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 78.25, led by Jaxon Smith-Njigba, Amon-Ra St. Brown, and Tee Higgins. The immediate preseason decision is not broad roster turnover; it is whether the RB slot currently occupied by Zach Charbonnet (51.6 C-AVI) can be improved without weakening the verified core.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Jaxon Smith-Njigba (99.1), Amon-Ra St. Brown (98.6), and Tee Higgins (81.9). That concentration gives All Hail King Jesus a defined top-end identity.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Among the eight verified championship-lineup slots, Zach Charbonnet is the lowest C-AVI starter at 51.6. Any preseason acquisition should be measured against that exact lineup threshold, not against the bottom of the bench.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 10 offensive players, leaving 2 offensive players outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 71.52, which should be used to judge whether consolidation improves the lineup more than it reduces flexibility.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 10 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active. There is no knowledge-backed reason for an emergency replacement move this week.

sections.title: Draft Assets
sections.body: No franchise-labelled draft asset was found in the approved knowledge files. The summary does not infer ownership from roster position or prior conversations.
